title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Nami, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17 as luffy enters the waiting room, meets dangerous competitors, and the tournament begins to reveal how many powers are converging on Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You're the best dancer in the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear about how the women in this place stab men? Someone like you is just asking for it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's fine if she stabs me... ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: alrighty! This is my chance. Let's just leave him on this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I really did try to stick with him... I gave it an honest attempt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But I'm getting jealous, seeing all these couples around here

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wonder if Nami- San and Robin-chan wouldn't just fall in love with me all at once here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Excuse me, are you the man who locked eyes with me before!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Please, put your arms around me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Pretty sure she took the back exit into "Lover's lane"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Right,so she couldn't have gotten far

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't let her out of this city

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I... I think I'll be alright

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry... Did you bump your head or something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No... the only thing I've bumped into is that fateful impact that we call a chance encounter

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...!! this is bad... I can't stop the love !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Eh!? No, you mustn't look at me in that way!! I'm a woman who's given up on love....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: In the past, strange men have all....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Right!! You made them all happy ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You were being chased!! Just who were those guys!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If I can lend my power in any way, just say the word

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
